title: Lemmy
description: Self-hosted, federated (ActivityPub) link aggregator and discussion forum - a Reddit-style alternative for the Fediverse.
installation: This template runs the PRIMARY Lemmy backend/API server ONLY (dessalines/lemmy, a Rust actix-web service listening on HTTP port 8536). Lemmy is a MULTI-CONTAINER stack and is NOT usable with this pod alone. CONFIG: Lemmy normally reads /config/config.hjson, but this template configures it purely via the LEMMY_* env vars - the critical ones are LEMMY_DATABASE_URL (points at the Postgres add-on) and LEMMY_HOSTNAME (your real public host, baked into ActivityPub actor URLs - set it BEFORE federating, it cannot be changed cleanly after going live). REQUIRED BEFORE FIRST BOOT: 1) Rotate the Postgres password. 2) The first user account you register through the UI becomes the instance admin - register it immediately after deploy. MANDATORY COMPANION SERVICES to deploy as SEPARATE Kubero apps: (A) FRONTEND - lemmy-ui, image dessalines/lemmy-ui:0.19.19, HTTP port 1234; set its env LEMMY_UI_LEMMY_INTERNAL_HOST to this backend's in-cluster service on :8536 and LEMMY_UI_LEMMY_EXTERNAL_HOST to your public host; PUBLIC INGRESS should be routed to lemmy-ui (port 1234), which proxies /api and /pictrs to the backend - the backend itself is an internal API. (B) IMAGE HOST - pict-rs, image asonix/pictrs:0.5, HTTP port 8080, with its own ~5Gi RWX volume at /mnt; point the backend at it via LEMMY_PICTRS__URL (e.g. http://lemmy-pictrs:8080/). (C) EMAIL (optional) - an SMTP relay such as mwader/postfix-relay for signup confirmation/notification mail; wire it via LEMMY_EMAIL__* or the smtp_server config. NOTE on datastores: Lemmy 0.19 needs ONLY PostgreSQL (>=15); it does NOT use Redis/Valkey. Federation, scheduled cleanup, and the outgoing activity queue all run inside this backend process - no separate worker/scheduler container is required.
